hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,os,sys;from pathlib import Path;hook=sys.argv[1];home=Path.home();roots=[Path(os.environ[v]) for v in ("CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT","CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT") if os.environ.get(v)];cwd=Path.cwd();roots += [cwd]+list(cwd.parents);p=home/".claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json";data=json.loads(p.read_text()) if p.is_file() else {"plugins":{}};roots += [Path(e["installPath"]) for e in data.get("plugins",{}).get("unified@unified-skills",[]) if e.get("installPath")];roots += [d for base in (home/".claude/plugins/cache/unified-skills/unified",home/".codex/plugins/cache/unified-skills/unified") for d in sorted(base.glob("*"),key=lambda x:x.stat().st_mtime,reverse=True)];roots += sorted((home/".codex/plugins/.marketplace-plugin-source-staging").glob("marketplace-plugin-source-*"),key=lambda x:x.stat().st_mtime,reverse=True);roots += [home/".claude/plugins/marketplaces/unified-skills",home/".codex/.tmp/marketplaces/unified-skills"];script=next((r/"hooks"/hook for r in roots if (r/"AGENTS.md").is_file() and (r/"hooks"/hook).is_file()),None);script and (os.environ.__setitem__("CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT",str(script.parents[1])) or os.execvp("bash",["bash",str(script)]));print(json.dumps({"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"[unified] cannot resolve plugin root for "+hook} if hook in ("careful.sh","freeze.sh") else {},ensure_ascii=False))' session-start.sh
